summary: Calibrate CPU energy idle-power constant + skip sub-ms RAPL noise (#71). CPU_IDLE_POWER_FRACTION 0.1 -> 0.7 (active-power semantic), assert_record skips energy band when measured_latency < 1ms. V4 matmul pass_energy 0/60 -> 12/60.

V4-4 Phase A: pytorch_cuda + pytorch_jetson measurers + sweep augmenter + plumbing. Mock-based tests so PR is reviewable on i7 dev box without target hardware. Includes capture-on-target runbooks (bin/v4-capture-{jetson-orin-nano,h100}.sh).

V4-5: KPU consistency-only invariants. Pure-function checks for roofline self-consistency, monotonicity, achieved-below-peak, family monotonicity. avg_power_below_tdp diagnostic xfailed with #81 as tracking issue.

V4-6: dedicated V4 model-validation gate workflow (.github/workflows/v4-validation.yml). Path-filtered, distinct PR check name 'V4 Model Validation', 6 meta-tests pin workflow structure. Plus validation/model_v4/README.md contributor guide.

On-chip BW peaks + L1_BOUND classifier dispatch (#61). Three Optional float fields on HardwareResourceModel; populated i7-12700K, H100-SXM5, KPU-T64 with cited sources; classifier emits Regime.L1_BOUND when populated, falls back to capacity-only path otherwise.
